title: Lunatico's Stuffys
body:
Behold, the epic Datapack for my super cool "Lunatico Stuffys" project! Get ready to level up your Minecraft game with some seriously awesome additions. We're talking about all the Eeveelutions and then some, times two!

(1.16.5 only!!)
But hey, before you start crafting these rad stuffys, you gotta be up for the challenge. NBTcrafting is the name of the game here, my friend. It's like the secret recipe for unleashing their full potential. Trust me, it's worth the effort because you'll feel like a total boss when you create these lovable companions with your own hands.

(1.16.5 only!!)
Oh, and if you're feeling extra adventurous, you'll need the BYG mod to make Sylveon and Abominaceon. This mod takes your Minecraft world to a whole new level of awesome. Seriously, it's like an expansion pack that opens up a whole universe of possibilities.

Now, about those recipes... They're like hidden gems waiting to be discovered. Each stuffy requires a specific wool block that matches its vibe, plus a special item to complete the magic. You'll have to dig into the code to find out exactly what you need, but trust me, the treasure hunt is part of the fun!
